og.title: Articles - Moneyhub
og.description: This page has to exist for WordPress to know where to put the “Posts” archive for the site. To edit the content at the top of the actual Articles page, please go to “Theme Options” in the WordPress menu. You can set the text and the featured content there. All other posts will be automatically […]

landmarks.innerText: ARTICLES Discover our articles Industry news, trends and the topics we’re all talking about. All Banking Pensions Wealth Lending Banking Jun 25, 2026 Why batch processed transaction enrichment is the silent enabler of modern payment fraud Modern fraud moves faster than batch process systems were designed to handle. Compare batch processing transaction enrichment versus real-time categorisation and enrichment to see where the opportunity lies for banks to reduce fraud. Read more Lending Jun 8, 2026 The rental revolution: turning monthly payments into financial rewards Shifting the power dynamic of the rental market, David Firth takes you behind the curtain on our latest partnership with Brick Rewards, which will help London renters to receive rewards at local businesses simply as they paying their rent on time. Read more Banking May 21, 2026 Is your banking app speaking in code? The multi-million-pound cost of transaction confusion Unrecognised transactions are triggering customer panic, unnecessary fraud disputes and rising operational costs for financial institutions. Discover how next-generation transaction enrichment technology can improve trust, reduce support workloads and strengthen AI-driven banking services. Read more Banking May 11, 2026 Transaction fraud detection: are false positives really that bad for banks? Are false positives a necessary inconvenience or a costly, brand-damaging feature of poor categorisation and enrichment? We explore how devastating false positives can be on operational efficiency, budgets and customer sentiment. Read more Banking May 6, 2026 Three reasons your bank fraud analysts are drowning in low-risk false positives High false positive rates are not inevitable. With proper structure in place, they can help reduce alert fatigue for your fraud team. But three factors usually drive them: static rules applied to dynamic behaviour, overly sensitive tuning, and incomplete or siloed data. Read more Pensions Apr 30, 2026 How pension providers can launch better member journeys in weeks, not years Widgets are the key to unlocking faster development and better journeys for pension providers to offer to their members. Sarah Farrier, Product Manager at Moneyhub takes pension providers through the reasons to use widgets as the perfect ROI tester before committing to larger roadmap activities. Read more Banking Lending Apr 23, 2026 Protecting the backbook: why data, not just rates, will win the 2026 remortgage race With remortgage applications surging by 46% in early 2026, lenders must shift their focus from interest rate competition to providing frictionless, data-led customer journeys. By leveraging Moneyhub’s AI-powered categorisation engine and Open Banking data, firms can automate income verification, slash underwriting times, and proactively support vulnerable borrowers. Read more Banking Pensions Wealth Mar 23, 2026 Activating 29 million ‘current account coasters’: key learnings from our webinar with Paragon Bank 29 million UK adults are "coasting" in low-interest accounts, costing them £20bn a year. Host David Firth shares his learnings from our recent webinar with Paragon Bank and how their Spring Savings app has enabled them to activate these customers, driving significant deposit growth and increased loyalty through intelligent simplicity. Read more Banking Lending Jan 27, 2026 Transforming the future of mutual banking: how Moneyhub underpins Nationwide’s growth plans At Moneyhub, our mission has always been clear: to drive better financial outcomes through responsible Smart Data and Open Finance. That is why our recent partnership with Nationwide Building Society, the world’s largest building society, is such a pivotal moment for the UK financial landscape. Read more Pensions Wealth Jan 19, 2026 How can pension providers contribute meaningful support on Blue Monday? Turn Blue Monday into a time for consumers to reflect on their short, mid and longterm financial goals, planning instead of stressing about the future. Read more Pensions Wealth Nov 27, 2025 How technology is democratising financial advice Make expert financial advice accessible to the mass market. Secure data sharing replaces costly, manual fact-finding. Read more Banking Lending Nov 11, 2025 Open Banking Expo 2025: The 7 payment lessons you can’t ignore Seven lessons from the Open Banking Expo that every payments enthusiast should recognise to ensure their business remains competitive. Read more 1 2 »

children.innerTextSummary: ARTICLES Discover our articles Industry news, trends and the topics we’re all talking about.
body: Articles
Industry news, trends and the topics we’re all talking about.

children.headlineText: Why batch processed transaction enrichment is the silent enabler of modern payment fraud
children.innerTextSummary: Banking Jun 25, 2026 Why batch processed transaction enrichment is the silent enabler of modern payment fraud Modern fraud moves faster than batch process systems were designed to handle. Compare batch processing transaction enrichment vers
body: Modern fraud moves faster than batch process systems were designed to handle. Compare batch processing transaction enrichment versus real-time categorisation and enrichment to see where the opportunity lies for banks to reduce fraud.
Read more

Shifting the power dynamic of the rental market, David Firth takes you behind the curtain on our latest partnership with Brick Rewards, which will help London renters to receive rewards at local businesses simply as they paying their rent on time.
Read more

Unrecognised transactions are triggering customer panic, unnecessary fraud disputes and rising operational costs for financial institutions. Discover how next-generation transaction enrichment technology can improve trust, reduce support workloads and strengthen AI-driven banking services.
Read more

Are false positives a necessary inconvenience or a costly, brand-damaging feature of poor categorisation and enrichment? We explore how devastating false positives can be on operational efficiency, budgets and customer sentiment.
Read more

High false positive rates are not inevitable. With proper structure in place, they can help reduce alert fatigue for your fraud team. But three factors usually drive them: static rules applied to dynamic behaviour, overly sensitive tuning, and incomplete or siloed data.
Read more

Widgets are the key to unlocking faster development and better journeys for pension providers to offer to their members. Sarah Farrier, Product Manager at Moneyhub takes pension providers through the reasons to use widgets as the perfect ROI tester before committing to larger roadmap activities.
Read more

With remortgage applications surging by 46% in early 2026, lenders must shift their focus from interest rate competition to providing frictionless, data-led customer journeys. By leveraging Moneyhub’s AI-powered categorisation engine and Open Banking data, firms can automate income verification, slash underwriting times, and proactively support vulnerable borrowers.
Read more

29 million UK adults are "coasting" in low-interest accounts, costing them £20bn a year. Host David Firth shares his learnings from our recent webinar with Paragon Bank and how their Spring Savings app has enabled them to activate these customers, driving significant deposit growth and increased loyalty through intelligent simplicity.
